calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment, And To Set Aside Default Of Defendant Felix R. Wasser &
Associates
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
George M. Lee, Esq., of SEILER EPSTEIN LLP. Tel:(415) 979-0500 for plaintiff.
Raymond G. Robinson, Esq., of ROBINSON-LEGAL. Tel: (435) 400-0015 for defendant.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff counsel contest portion of the tentative ruling as is follows: "because no attorney has appeared for defendants in this case the defendants must be served with the moving papers. Moreover, there is no proof that the individual defendant has even been served with the summons and complaint." The matter having been argued, upon conclusion of the hearing,the Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

Counsel for defendant Raymond Robinson has stipulated to the entry of judgment, The PLAINTIFFs NOBAL CORPORATION A CORPORATION, SOFI AHLUWALIA's Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment, And To Set Aside Default Of Defendant Felix R. Wasser & Associates is GRANTED.

Order Submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
